name: Security - Content Safety Guardrails Enforcement
description: Ensures that the content safety decorator blocks or sanitizes unsafe input/output according to the GUARDRAILS_CONFIG.
input: A request containing toxic or unsafe content (e.g., input with profanity or PII).
output: A response dict indicating the request was blocked or sanitized.
success_criteria: response['success'] is False or content is sanitized
No unsafe content is returned in the output
Appropriate error or warning is present
error_scenarios: Content safety decorator fails to block unsafe content
Unsafe content is returned to the user
